name: adj-clean-practice-area
note: the single most common false positive: a firm WRITING ABOUT a topic is not committing it. The model clears it with a verbatim disproof, so it ships as pass, never a violation (C-092). PRECISION.

candidates.description: page appears to admit involvement in money laundering
candidates.evidence_quote: We defend clients accused of fraud and money laundering across the United Kingdom.
